+--------+        +---------+        +---------+        +--------------+        +---------+
|  Exit  |<-------+  Check  |<-------+  Inner  |<-------+  Loop Start  |<-------+  Entry  |
+--------+        +---------+        +---------+        +--------------+        +---------+
                       :                                        ^
                       :                                        :
                       +----------------------------------------+
